creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Here's another update:

diff -ruN /tmp/tvguide.old/Makefile tvguide/Makefile
--- /tmp/tvguide.old/Makefile	Tue Aug  7 20:42:46 2001
+++ tvguide/Makefile	Wed Aug  8 14:47:18 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tvguide
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.9.1
 CATEGORIES=	misc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.cherrynebula.net/downloads/
 
diff -ruN /tmp/tvguide.old/distinfo tvguide/distinfo
--- /tmp/tvguide.old/distinfo	Tue Aug  7 19:42:40 2001
+++ tvguide/distinfo	Wed Aug  8 14:47:40 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (tvguide-1.9.0.tar.gz) = 517206e1917c6dc0835ce7c8ae3a6f6a
+MD5 (tvguide-1.9.1.tar.gz) = 74fec053abacc429cbb2c1efe2f56c41

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
